title: Tridents Load Chunks
description: Simple server sided mod to make loyalty tridents load chunks when thrown.
body:
![An enchanted trident flies over a golden sunset above the ocean.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Flopgop/TridentsLoadChunks/refs/heads/master/gallery/banner.png) \
\
A simple server-sided mod that makes loyalty tridents load chunks when thrown. The max distance from the thrower that the trident can load chunks is configurable in the config (in chunks), as well as whether to teleport the trident when the player has gotten too far. This does not affect tridents without loyalty, nor tridents that do not belong to players.
